projects - Konsole

root@host:~$

tail projects.log|
  • Aquí puedes encontrar algunos de mis proyectos:
  • [ 💎 ]
    Minitest-cc - Minitest plugin for give a minimal report of code coverage.
    ~> Preview Repository
  • [ 💎 ]
    Mytotp - Mytotp is a cli app for generate totp codes.
    ~> Preview Repository
  • [ 💎 ]
    Paso - Rails app for short urls. Using the RailsUrlShortener engine.
    ~> Preview Repository
  • [ 💎 ]
    RailsUrlShortener - Rails engine for providing url shortener functionalities.
    ~> Preview Repository
  • [ 🐍 ]
    simple-fastapi-example - Simple API REST project created with FASTAPI
    ~> Preview Repository
  • [ 🐍 ]
    sshdb - CLI tool for managing ssh connection's data. (host, user ...)
    ~> Preview Repository
  • [ HTML ]
    Mypage - This personal site made with jekyll.
    ~> Preview Repository

root@host:~$ |
